rules.thresholds: вүҘ25%вҶ’20 В· 15вҖ“25вҶ’15 В· 8вҖ“15вҶ’10 В· 3вҖ“8вҶ’5 В· <3вҶ’0

rules.thresholds: вүҘвӮ№1,000crвҶ’10 В· вүҘ250вҶ’7 В· вүҘ50вҶ’4 В· <50вҶ’2

rules.thresholds: вүӨ0.3вҶ’25 В· вүӨ0.75вҶ’19 В· вүӨ1.5вҶ’10 В· вүӨ2.5вҶ’4 В· >2.5вҶ’0

rules.thresholds: вүҘ8xвҶ’10 В· вүҘ4вҶ’7 В· вүҘ2вҶ’4 В· <2вҶ’0

rules.thresholds: вүҘ25%вҶ’20 В· вүҘ15вҶ’16 В· вүҘ8вҶ’10 В· вүҘ0вҶ’5 В· <0вҶ’0

rules.thresholds: вүҘ25%вҶ’20 В· вүҘ15вҶ’16 В· вүҘ8вҶ’10 В· вүҘ0вҶ’5 В· <0вҶ’0
rules.evidence: PAT CAGR 17.9% over the restated period
rules.rationale: Multi-year compounding, not just the latest pre-IPO year.

rules.thresholds: every yoy step positive вҶ’ full points
rules.rationale: Consistency separates trend from a single dressed-up year.

rules.thresholds: vs peer-median P/E: <0.7xвҶ’30 В· 0.7вҖ“1.1вҶ’22 В· 1.1вҖ“1.5вҶ’12 В· >1.5вҶ’4

rules.rationale: Sanity check independent of the issuer-chosen peer set.

rules.thresholds: вүҘ60%вҶ’15 В· вүҘ45вҶ’12 В· вүҘ30вҶ’7 В· <30вҶ’3

rules.thresholds: вүӨ25% OFSвҶ’15 В· вүӨ50вҶ’10 В· вүӨ75вҶ’5 В· >75вҶ’0
rules.evidence: OFS вӮ№860 cr of вӮ№860 cr total (100%) вҖ” fresh capital вӮ№0 cr goes to the company, OFS to selling holders
rules.rationale: Exit-heavy offers raise nothing for growth; every manual analyst review leads with this.

rules.thresholds: no promoter pledgeвҶ’10 В· pledge disclosedвҶ’0
rules.evidence: No promoter share pledge detected in Capital Structure / Risk Factors
rules.rationale: Pledged promoter stakes transmit personal leverage into the stock.

rules.thresholds: 0вҶ’10 В· 1вҖ“2вҶ’4 В· >2вҶ’0
rules.rationale: Criminal matters against company/promoters/directors.

rules.thresholds: cleanвҶ’10 В· emphasis of matterвҶ’5 В· qualified/adverseвҶ’0

rules.rationale: Auditor reservations are the highest-signal governance flag in the document.

rules.thresholds: history of dividendsвҶ’5 В· noneвҶ’3
rules.evidence: No dividends declared in reported years
rules.rationale: A payout history modestly evidences real distributable cash.

rules.thresholds: 100 вҲ’ ОЈ(critical 18 В· high 10 В· medium 4 В· low 1)

rules.thresholds: вүҘ+5pt vs peer medianвҶ’15 В· вүҘ0вҶ’11 В· вүҘвҲ’5вҶ’6 В· elseвҶ’2
rules.evidence: Issuer RoE 30.4% vs peer median RoNW 27.9%
rules.rationale: Return spread vs the listed peers named in the RHP.

rules.thresholds: leadership claim presentвҶ’5 (company-claimed, unverified) В· noneвҶ’3
rules.evidence: Company claims: вҖңвҖҰtop 3вҖҰвҖқ вҖ” note this is the issuer's own characterisation
rules.rationale: Claims are recorded but explicitly labelled as company-sourced.

rules.thresholds: вүҘ20%вҶ’15 В· вүҘ12вҶ’11 В· вүҘ6вҶ’6 В· <6вҶ’1
rules.rationale: Returns on capital are the core of business quality compounding.

rules.thresholds: вүҘ20%вҶ’15 В· вүҘ12вҶ’11 В· вүҘ6вҶ’6 В· <6вҶ’1
rules.rationale: Returns on capital are the core of business quality compounding.

rules.thresholds: all reported years positive вҶ’ full points
rules.evidence: CFO positive in 3/3 reported years (FY25: вӮ№187cr, FY24: вӮ№101cr, FY23: вӮ№52cr)

rules.thresholds: вүҘ1.0вҶ’20 В· вүҘ0.8вҶ’14 В· вүҘ0.5вҶ’8 В· <0.5вҶ’0
rules.rationale: Profit that never becomes cash is the classic earnings-quality failure.

verdict: Strong fundamentals В· Valuation indeterminate В· low risk profile
